stamps.name: Vatican
stamps.caption: VISITED

A single passport visa rubber stamp, centred on warm off-white paper.

- the country name VATICAN in bold condensed uppercase sans-serif
- the single word VISITED

Print NO date, year, number or serial anywhere on the stamp.
